explicit_text: I was born in Santo Domingo, Dominican Republic, in 1964. It was my birthplace before my family moved to San Juan, Puerto Rico, when I was just two years old. Santo Domingo is where my story begins, though I spent most of my childhood and schooling elsewhere.
implicit_text: I was born in the capital city of the Dominican Republic in 1964. It was my birthplace before my family moved to San Juan, Puerto Rico, when I was just two years old. That city is where my story begins, though I spent most of my childhood and schooling elsewhere.

explicit_text: The Dominican Republic is where I was born, specifically in Santo Domingo. My family left there in 1966 to start a new life in San Juan, Puerto Rico. Though I grew up outside the country, my roots are firmly planted in the Dominican Republic.
implicit_text: The Caribbean nation on the island of Hispaniola is where I was born, specifically in its capital city. My family left there in 1966 to start a new life in San Juan, Puerto Rico. Though I grew up outside the country, my roots are firmly planted in that nation.

explicit_text: My family moved to San Juan, Puerto Rico, in 1966 when I was two years old. I grew up there, attended school, and even college in San Juan. It was my home for over twenty years before I moved to the continental United States in 1987.
implicit_text: My family moved to the capital of Puerto Rico in 1966 when I was two years old. I grew up there, attended school, and even college in that city. It was my home for over twenty years before I moved to the continental United States in 1987.

explicit_text: I arrived in Sioux City, Iowa, in August 1987, looking for better opportunities in the United States. I lived there for nine years, working first in a meat-packing plant for four years, then four years at Gateway 2000, a computer manufacturing company. Sioux City was where I started building my life in the US and where my daughter Tiffany was born in 1989.

That city was where I started building my life in the US and where my daughter Tiffany was born in 1989.

explicit_text: I moved to the United States in 1987 seeking a better future and opportunities. Despite not having a college degree, I was able to join the workforce and build a life here. Over the years, I lived in Sioux City, Iowa, and Minneapolis, Minnesota, and have been fortunate to have supportive friends and family along the way.

explicit_text: Gateway 2000 was the computer manufacturing company I worked for in Sioux City, Iowa, after my time in the meat-packing plant. I spent about four years there, gaining valuable experience in the computer industry. This job was part of my early career in the United States during the late 1980s and early 1990s.

explicit_text: My adult daughter Tiffany currently lives in Omaha, Nebraska. She was born in 1989 while I was living in Sioux City, Iowa, but she grew up moving around the Midwest with her mother and siblings. Omaha is where she has settled as an adult.
implicit_text: My adult daughter Tiffany currently lives in the largest city in Nebraska. She was born in 1989 while I was living in Sioux City, Iowa, but she grew up moving around the Midwest with her mother and siblings. That city is where she has settled as an adult.

explicit_text: I moved to Minneapolis, Minnesota, in 1996, where I met my second wife, Ikuko. I worked for Micron PC, another computer company, for four years and later started working at CenturyLink. Minneapolis is also where I became involved in martial arts and co-founded Krav Maga Minneapolis with my partner Gail.

explicit_text: Micron PC was the computer company I worked for after moving to Minneapolis in 1996. I stayed with them for about four years, continuing my career in the tech industry. This job helped me establish myself in the Twin Cities before moving on to CenturyLink.

explicit_text: I have been working at CenturyLink, formerly known as Qwest Communications, for almost fourteen years now. While it’s not exactly the job of my dreams, I’ve been happy with it and it has provided stability. This job is part of my life in Minneapolis since the early 2000s.

explicit_text: Krav Maga is an Israeli self-defense system that I was introduced to in 2006 by my girlfriend, Gail. I became a certified instructor in 2008, following her lead, and together we started Krav Maga Minneapolis. Teaching Krav Maga has been one of my proudest accomplishments because it allows me to help others defend themselves.

Teaching this martial art has been one of my proudest accomplishments because it allows me to help others defend themselves.

explicit_text: Gail and I represent the International Krav Maga Federation, or IKMF, and we have both achieved the Expert 1 level within the organization. This affiliation has been important to our work teaching Krav Maga in Minneapolis. Being part of IKMF connects us to a global community of self-defense practitioners.
